auth.registerMessage: Fill in the information below to create your account
auth.signinMessage: Enter your credentials below to access your account
auth.name: Name
auth.banner: All your links in one place
auth.bannerDescription: Perfect for sharing your social profiles, portfolio, and more
auth.createUsernameDescription: This will be the name used for your page link
auth.signinFailed: Sign in failed, please check your credentials and try again

errors.emailAlreadyInUse: This email is already in use
errors.usernameAlreadyInUse: This username is already in use
errors.unknown: An unexpected error occurred, please try again
errors.failedToUpdateUsername: Failed to update username, please try again

emailConfirmation.title: Email Confirmation
emailConfirmation.description: We have sent an email to <bold>{{email}}</bold> with a link to confirm your email address. Please check your inbox and click the link to complete the registration

resetPassword.title: Forgot your password?
resetPassword.description: Enter your email below and we will send you a link to reset your password
resetPassword.sendError: Failed to send password recovery email, please try again
resetPassword.checkEmailDescription: We have sent an email to <bold>{{email}}</bold> with a link to reset your password. Please check your inbox and click the link to create a new password

changePassword.title: Change Password
changePassword.error: Failed to update password, please try again

validation.onlyLettersAndSpaces: Only letters and spaces are allowed
validation.onlyLettersNumbersUnderscoresDot: Only letters, numbers, dots, and underscores are allowed
